00029 
00030 #include <types.h>
00031 #include <lib.h>
00032 #include <lamebus/lamebus.h>
00033 #include <lamebus/lser.h>
00034 #include "autoconf.h"
00035 
00036 /* Lowest revision we support */
00037 #define LOW_VERSION   1
00038 /* Highest revision we support */
00039 #define HIGH_VERSION  1
00040 
00041 /*
00042  * wrappers to satisfy the type system
00043  */
00044 static
00045 void
00046 do_lamebus_mask_interrupt(void *bus, uint32_t buspos)
00047 {
00048         struct lamebus_softc *lb = bus;
00049         lamebus_mask_interrupt(lb, buspos);
00050 }
00051 
00052 static
00053 void
00054 do_lamebus_unmask_interrupt(void *bus, uint32_t buspos)
00055 {
00056         struct lamebus_softc *lb = bus;
00057         lamebus_unmask_interrupt(lb, buspos);
00058 }
00059 
00060 /*
00061  * attachment function
00062  */
00063 struct lser_softc *
00064 attach_lser_to_lamebus(int lserno, struct lamebus_softc *sc)
00065 {
00066         struct lser_softc *ls;
00067         int slot = lamebus_probe(sc, LB_VENDOR_CS161, LBCS161_SERIAL,
00068                                  LOW_VERSION, HIGH_VERSION);
00069         if (slot < 0) {
00070                 return NULL;
00071         }
00072 
00073         ls = kmalloc(sizeof(struct lser_softc));
00074         if (ls==NULL) {
00075                 return NULL;
00076         }
00077 
00078         (void)lserno;  // unused
00079 
00080         ls->ls_busdata = sc;
00081         ls->ls_buspos = slot;
00082         ls->ls_maskinterrupt = do_lamebus_mask_interrupt;
00083         ls->ls_unmaskinterrupt = do_lamebus_unmask_interrupt;
00084 
00085         lamebus_mark(sc, slot);
00086         lamebus_attach_interrupt(sc, slot, ls, lser_irq);
00087 
00088         return ls;
00089 }
